findings.detail: Six nodes form a clean left-to-right linear pipeline: User Message → LLM Decides → Routing Software → External Tool Runs → LLM Gets Result → Final Answer. This maps exactly to the four-step cycle in §5.2 (Step 1 Decide, Step 2 Request, Step 3 Execute, Step 4 Return) with entry and exit bookends. No branching — single-path discipline holds.

All three core tool types (search, calculator, code runner) are surfaced in the 12px subtitle of the EXECUTE node: 'Step 3 — Search · Calculator · Code Runner'. This avoids exceeding the 8-node ceiling while still satisfying the requirement to show all three types. The middle-dot separator reads cleanly as a set of alternatives, not a sequence.

All six bold labels (User Message, LLM Decides, Routing Software, External Tool Runs, LLM Gets Result, Final Answer) trace directly to corpus Core Concepts §5.2 and §5.5. 'LLM' is corpus-defined in Prerequisites and used throughout — not a bare unexplained acronym. No out-of-headline-scope nodes (no multi-agent, no RAG internals, no prompt engineering). All labels ≤ 4 words.

USER_IN uses 'start' blue (#a5d8ff). DECIDE, ROUTER, RETURN use 'auto' purple (#d0bfff) — correct for automated LLM reasoning and software-layer steps. EXECUTE uses 'act' blue (#a5d8ff) — correct as the action-execution node where the external call happens. USER_OUT uses 'done' green (#b2f2bb). No hitl (yellow) nodes — none are needed for this topic (no human-in-the-loop steps in the tool-use cycle). No color tier violations.
Governing concept 'Four-Step Tool-Use Cycle' is in the --- config title: field, not a ghost node or dangling annotation. Pass.

The ROUTER node ('Routing Software') with subtitle 'LLM never calls tools directly' makes §5.5's key structural insight visible. The edge label 'structured request' on DECIDE→ROUTER also signals the §5.2 Step 2 Request mechanism, not just an anonymous arrow.

preflight.mermaid_parse: pass (config block correctly structured with title, theme, themeVariables, config.flowchart; flowchart LR with valid node/edge/classDef/class syntax)
preflight.label_discipline: pass (all bold labels <= 4 words: 'User Message', 'LLM Decides', 'Routing Software', 'External Tool Runs', 'LLM Gets Result', 'Final Answer')
preflight.concept_fidelity: pass (all 6 labels trace to §5.2 four-step cycle + §5.5 handshake; no out-of-scope nodes)
preflight.jargon_label: pass ('LLM' is corpus-defined in Prerequisites; used as established shorthand throughout §5.x)
preflight.title_discipline: pass (governing concept in title: config field, not a dangling ghost node)
preflight.single_path: pass (pure linear chain USER_IN→DECIDE→ROUTER→EXECUTE→RETURN→USER_OUT; one outgoing edge per node; no side spurs)

stats.render_note: PNG requires mmdc on PATH. Run: mmdc -i <mmd_path> -o <png_path> -w 1400 -b transparent
